prompt: Two references are attached: a PHOTO of the actual dish, and a vintage voucher whose food illustration shows the ENGRAVING STYLE to use. Draw the dish from the photo as a hand-tinted chromolithograph spot illustration in that engraving style, in NATURAL true-to-life colors: wide hand-torn ribbon noodles in warm curry-turmeric tones lifted high with wooden chopsticks above a white ceramic bowl, ribbons irregular and glossy, flecks of fresh green bell pepper and cilantro, scraps of seasoned meat in natural browns, gentle pale steam. No hands or people. Isolated subject on a fully TRANSPARENT background - nothing else at all. No yellow or gold color cast on the bowl, chopsticks, or greens; colors natural and true. No border, no frame, no text, no background, no shadow. Subject fills about 70% of the frame. Warm ochre-sepia engraved linework with natural hand-tinted flat color washes. Flat traditional print illustration, no photorealism.
